name: vision
description: Vision analysis tools for image understanding, face recognition, and visual search. Model-agnostic: requires an active model with mmproj (multimodal projector) for VL operations.

tools.name: vision_analyze
tools.description: Analyze an image using the vision pipeline. Returns EXIF data, VL description, face detection, and/or CLIP embeddings depending on enabled analyzers. Requires a multimodal model (with mmproj) to be active for VL operations.

image_path.description: Path to image file to analyze

analyzers.description: Comma-separated analyzer names: exif, face_detect, face_embed, vl_describe, vl_ocr, vl_structured, clip_embed. Default: exif,vl_describe

vl_prompt.description: Custom prompt for VL description (default: 'Describe this image in detail')

tools.name: vision_search
tools.description: Search previously analyzed images by text query using CLIP embeddings. Requires prior analysis with clip_embed analyzer.

tools.name: vision_face_identify
tools.description: Identify known faces in an image by matching against the face database. Requires prior face clustering/labeling.
